videos.title: Chaos Rising Might Be Pokémon’s BEST Set Yet…
videos.description:
The brand-new Pokémon Mega Evolution: Chaos Rising Elite Trainer Box is finally here and this set might honestly be one of the craziest Pokémon TCG releases we’ve seen in a long time. Between the incredible artwork, insane pull rates, Mega Evolution cards, and rumors of Demi-God packs, I had to open this ETB immediately.

In this video, we crack open the new Chaos Rising ETB, check out the promo cards, booster packs, accessories, and see if we can pull some absolute heat. Did we hit one of the b

videos.title: This Set Might Be WAY Better Than People Think…
videos.description:
We finally got our hands on a Perfect Order Booster Box… and I had to rip the entire thing open 🔥

This is the third full set in the series, and while it’s smaller and a bit more under-the-radar compared to something like Ascended Heroes, there are still some serious chase cards here 👀 From Illustration Rares to Ultra Rares and even that elusive gold card… the question is—did we actually pull anything crazy?

videos.title: Pokémon Fans Are About To Lose Their Minds | Pokemon Presents!
videos.description:
Pokémon just dropped a massive wave of announcements for the franchise’s 30th anniversary — including the reveal of Generation 10: Winds & Waves, classic games returning, GameCube titles coming back, new collectibles, and even previews of what’s next for the Pokémon TCG.

In this video, I break down everything announced during Pokémon Presents in about 7 minutes, including the biggest news that fans have been waiting years for.

We’ll cover:

videos.title: Pokémon Sent Me a MASSIVE 30th Anniversary Mystery Box… I Wasn’t Ready 😳
videos.description:
Pokémon is officially turning 30 years old, and it’s honestly wild to think about how big this franchise has become over the decades. From playing Pokémon Blue on a Game Boy Color as a kid to now opening special anniversary packages on the channel… this one was a full nostalgia moment.

To celebrate the anniversary, Pokémon sent over a massive mystery box packed with merch, collectibles, and even some TCG products — including Mega Evolutions packs that we open in this video. We also talk about P

videos.title: I Opened EVERY Ascended Heroes Product… The Pulls Were INSANE
videos.description:
Ascended Heroes continues! This is day three of opening products from the brand new Pokémon TCG Ascended Heroes set, and today we’re cracking open the Deluxe Pin Collection, Booster Bundle, and a collectible tin to see what kind of pulls we can get.

videos.title: 🔥 I Opened a $300 Pokémon Celebrations ETB… Was It a Huge Mistake?
videos.description:
The Pokémon 30th Anniversary hype is officially here… and that gave me the perfect excuse to finally open something I’ve NEVER opened before — a Pokémon Celebrations Elite Trainer Box.

This set originally released back in 2021 for the 25th anniversary, but with prices climbing again and nostalgia at an all-time high, I wanted to experience it for myself. videos.title: This Might Be the BEST Pokémon Box of 2026… (Lucario Premium Collection)
videos.description:
Early look at the Ascended Heroes Premium Poster Collection (Mega Lucario) 👀

In this video, I open the brand new premium collection ahead of release to show exactly what you get in the box — including the Mega Lucario promo, 10 Ascended Heroes booster packs, and the massive double-sided poster. We rip all 10 packs on camera, talk pull rates, and see if this is actually worth your money when it drops.
